title: Apples
description: Total overhaul to apples in Minecraft
body:
I LOVE APPLES I LOVE APPLES I LOVE APPLES I LOVE APPLES I LOVE APPLES I LOVE APPLES I LOVE APPLES I LOVE APPLES I LOVE APPLES I LOVE APPLES I LOVE APPLES I LOVE APPLES I LOVE APPLES I LOVE APPLES 


## 🍎 About

This mod mainly adds Diamond and Netherite type of apples, but also there are some other things that will be change in your world such as poisonous and green apple that can both drop from a oak leaves. First after eating give poison effect to player, second regeneration, but eating it will be a waste becouse of fact that it can be used to craft Enchanted Golden and Diamond apple. Next change is that gold apples require only four ingots to craft. I think thats it for now

## 🍎 Other Media

If you found a bug, or want to suggest your own idea you can chat with me about it on our [Discord]

You can support me or buy texture pack on the [Patreon]

Also check out my [PMC page](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/WindyBee/)

## 🍎 Details

<details>
<summary>Loot Table Chances</summary>
Structures |


Desert Pyramid |
12% - Diamond Apple |
1,2% - Enchanted Diamond Apple |

Woodland Mansion |
12% - Diamond Apple |
1,5% - Enchanted Diamond Apple |
 
Stronghold |
12% - Diamond Apple |

Jungle Temple |
45% - Diamond Apple |
24% - Enchanted Diamond Apple |

Bastion Treasure |
9% - Netherite Apple |
3% - Enchanted Netherite Apple |

Oak Leaves |

Regular Apple |
0,5% - No Fortune |
0,556% - Fortune I |
0,625% - Fortune II |
0,833% - Fortune III |

Regular Apple |
0,05% - No Fortune |
0,0556% - Fortune I |
0,0625% - Fortune II |
0,0833% - Fortune III |
(10 Times rarer than regular) |

Poisonous Apple |
0,25% - No Fortune |
(/2 Per each fortune level) |


</details>


<details>
<summary>List of Craftings</summary>

  
- Golden Apple - Apple in the middle and 4 gold ingots around it in the cross shape

  
- Enchanted Golden Apple - Green Apple in the middle and 4 gold ingots around it in the cross shape
  
  
- Diamond Apple - Apple in the middle and 4 diamonds around it in the cross shape

  
- Enchanted Diamond Apple - Green Apple in the middle and 4 diamonds around it in the cross shape  

  
- Netherite Apple - Diamond Apple + Netherite Ingot + Upgrade Template in the Smithing Table

  
- Enchanted Netherite Apple - Enchanted Diamond Apple + Netherite Ingot + Upgrade Template in the Smithing Table

</details>



<details>
<summary>Apple Effects</summary>

Golden Apple - Same as vanilla


Enchanted Golden Apple - Same as vanilla


Diamond Apple - Slowfalling2/5seconds Regeneration2/20seconds Absorption4/2minutes Nightvision2/2minutes


Enchanted Diamond Apple - Slowfalling2/5seconds Regeneration2/24seconds Absorption6/2minutes Nightvision2/2minutes Strengh2/1minute


Netherite Apple - Slowfalling2/5seconds Regeneration2/20seconds Absorption6/2minutes Nightvision2/2minutes Resistance1/5minutes Fireresistance1/5minutes


Netherite Apple - Slowfalling2/5seconds Regeneration2/30seconds Absorption6/2minutes Nightvision2/2minutes Strengh2/2minutes Resistance1/5minutes Fireresistance1/5minutes Speed1/2minutes


Poisonous Apple - Poison2/30minutes


Green Apple - Regenetarion2/20seconds


</details>
